item.description:
The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 4min Last year, U.S. Soccer CEO JT Batson told reporters that the 2026 men's World Cup could serve as a “test run” for organizers of the women's competition hosted in 2031, which will also be co-hosted by the U.S.
But with the latest tensions between host cities and FIFA, and the Mostrar más 5 2 16 2 mil
